file_insights.docs_directory: MIGRATION_GUIDE.md file contains comprehensive documentation for authentication system migration
file_insights.guide_content: 1403 lines of detailed migration documentation covering legacy vs new systems, migration strategy, implementation steps, testing, and deployment
file_insights.specification_files: Multiple ._ prefixed files (._docs, ._implementation_plan.json, ._performance_analysis.md, etc.) indicating work in progress or temporary state
file_insights.memory_files: Attempt history and build commits stored in memory directory with structured JSON format for tracking migration progress
file_insights.implementation_plan: Implementation plan JSON file outlines technical specifications for the migration
file_insights.architecture_docs: Comprehensive documentation includes architecture, error handling, integration guide, session management, token refresh flow, and troubleshooting guides

patterns_discovered.incremental_migration: Phase-based approach with feature flags to minimize risk and enable gradual rollout
patterns_discovered.backward_compatibility: New implementation designed to work alongside existing code with optional feature flag activation
patterns_discovered.comprehensive_documentation: Extensive documentation covering architecture, error handling, migration steps, testing, and deployment
patterns_discovered.structured_migration: Systematic approach with pre-migration checklist, step-by-step implementation, and post-migration tasks
patterns_discovered.monitoring_integrated: Built-in monitoring with error tracking, analytics, and performance monitoring as part of migration strategy

gotchas_discovered.large_migration_scope: Migration involves complex token refresh system with 95% improvement in failed refreshes but requires careful rollout strategy
gotchas_discovered.binary_file_truncation: Git diff shows binary ._ files that couldn't be fully displayed in the diff output
gotchas_discovered.file_structure_complexity: Multiple nested directories and files indicating complex project structure for authentication migration
gotchas_discovered.comprehensive_testing_required: Extensive testing checklist suggests migration needs thorough validation across multiple scenarios
gotchas_discovered.dependency_management: Requires specific dependencies like flutter_secure_storage and connectivity_plus that need careful integration

approach_outcome.successful_documentation: Successfully created comprehensive migration guide covering all aspects from strategy to testing
approach_outcome.risk_minimization: Incremental approach with feature flags allows controlled rollout and easy rollback capability
approach_outcome.user_impact_management: Phased approach ensures minimal user impact with no downtime using feature flags
approach_outcome.technical_debt_reduction: Clean migration strategy removes legacy code and updates tests as final phase
approach_outcome.monitoring_framework: Integrated monitoring setup allows tracking of migration progress and system health

recommendations: Implement feature flag management system for controlled rollout
Establish comprehensive monitoring before starting migration
Create staging environment for testing the migration process
Develop automated rollback procedures for each migration phase
Schedule maintenance windows for migration phases with user impact
Update CI/CD pipeline to support feature flag deployments
Conduct thorough performance testing after each migration phase
Document all changes for future reference and maintenance
Consider canary releases for final phases to minimize risk
Establish post-migration monitoring and optimization plan
